title: Can You Spot the Fair Value Gap? Test Your ICT Skills
description: Think you know fair value gaps? Most traders miss these 3 critical signs that separate profitable ICT traders from the rest. Test your smart money concepts knowledge with R2F Trading's essential FVG checklist.
script: Missing fair value gaps costs traders thousands. Here's what you're overlooking. First mistake: Trading every gap. Only trade gaps with liquidity sweeps above. Second: Ignoring timeframe confluence. Higher timeframe FVGs are stronger setups. Third: No invalidation rules. Set clear levels where your FVG setup fails. Master these FVG concepts. Follow R2F Trading for more ICT breakdowns.
